[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111101011 7
3 010111011 6
4 110110001 5
5 111011111 8
6 100011111 6
7 111111110 8

01 10 111110101 7
12 21 101011111 7
23 32 101111110 7
34 43 101111101 7
45 54 101111111 8
56 65 111111110 8 match 7
67 76 011111110 7
70 07 011110100 5

02 20 011111110 7
13 31 101101101 6
24 42 001011111 6
35 53 101111110 7
46 64 011111111 8
57 75 111110110 7

71 17 111110101 7

50 05 111110110 7
61 16 111101111 8
